data.title: Hesai Group to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, May 19, 2026
data.description: Investors are eagerly anticipating an earnings call set to take place at 8:00 AM Eastern Time on May 19, 2026. This event is expected to provide crucial insights into the financial performance of the company, with key figures such as revenue, profits, and potentially future projections being disclosed. Shareholders and analysts will be keenly observing the call for any significant developments that may impact the company's stock price and overall market position.

data.title: Thom Tillis Green Lights 'Outstanding Nominee' Kevin Warsh's Fed Chair Confirmation After DOJ Drops Powell Probe
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis from North Carolina has announced his support for the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as the Federal Reserve chair nominee. Tillis previously stated he would block any Fed nominee during a Department of Justice investigation into Powell. However, he is now satisfied that the case is closed and supports the ongoing Inspector General's review. Tillis praised Warsh as an excellent nominee and emphasized the importance of ending the criminal investigation into Powell for Fed's independence. He expressed his approval for Warsh on Sunday and mentioned his readiness for the confirmation process. Tillis made these statements on NBC's "Meet the Press" and through his Twitter account on April 26, 2026.
The Kremlin reports on Putin and Trump's contacts when they happen, Peskov stated.

data.title: Oil prices increased, stocks dropped as talks between US and Iran stalled when Trump halted visit to Pakistan by negotiators.
data.description: The prices of oil experienced an increase while stock prices saw a decline following President Trump's decision to cancel a visit to Pakistan by two American negotiators for discussions aimed at achieving peace with Iran.

data.title: The Science Based Targets initiative has validated Loomis' new emissions reduction targets
data.description: In Stockholm on April 27, 2026, it was announced that Loomis has established ambitious new short-term greenhouse gas (GHG) reduction goals across Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions. This move makes Loomis the pioneering company in its sector to attain validation from the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). This validation underlines Loomis' commitment to sustainability and signifies a major step towards reducing its environmental impact.

data.title: Absa Bank Strengthens Fraud Prevention, Fraud Investigation Customer Communication and Improves Collections Outcomes Using FICO Technology
data.description: In Johannesburg, Absa Group Limited, a leading South African bank, has enhanced its debt collection techniques and fraud prevention measures through innovative customer communications technology provided by FICO, a major analytics software company. By leveraging WhatsApp for real-time verification of potential fraudulent activities with clients, Absa achieved a notable 47% increase in self-resolution rates for digital and card fraud cases and effectively thwarted a higher number of fraudulent incidents. This initiative has enabled Absa to streamline its fraud investigation process and bolster its overall security measures, showcasing a significant advancement in its operational strategies.

data.title: Hitachi Digital Services Announces Strategic Partnership with Stripe to Transform Payment Infrastructure, Debuts Joint Industry Event
data.description: A collaboration between Hitachi Digital Services and Stripe in London has resulted in the integration of advanced infrastructure with AI technology to streamline a convoluted payment system. This partnership aims to simplify the process and make it more efficient, benefiting both companies and customers. The joint effort combines expertise in infrastructure with innovative AI-driven solutions to enhance the overall payment experience. This development showcases the potential of merging technology for practical applications.

data.title: 70% of Enterprise AI is Uncontrolled, Driving Hidden Risk, Cost and Slower ROI
data.description: In Morrisville, North Carolina, it has been observed that AI is currently being utilized throughout various organizations, regardless of formal approval. Employees are implementing AI tools independently from IT oversight, leading to the emergence of 'shadow AI' within the enterprise. Consequently, this trend is generating governance and control discrepancies. This issue transcends the realm of IT and is now a concern for Chief Information Security Officers. This transition is broadening the potential points of attack, covering devices, endpoints, and data streams, which is elevating unregulated risks and exacerbating the vulnerability landscape.

data.title: PlaqueTec Closes $5 Million Financing
data.description: A medtech company based in Cambridge, England, PlaqueTec, has raised $5 million through an oversubscribed financing round funded by its existing investors. The funding will be utilized for further development of BioCarta, the company's cardiovascular data lake. This repository houses distinctive intracoronary proteomic and clinical data related to identifying inflammatory drivers of cardiovascular disease (CVD).

data.title: Striking workers, labour leaders, and community allies to rally outside Province House this morning
data.description: In Halifax, NS, a group consisting of striking long term care workers, community supporters, and labor representatives, such as Candace Rennick, National Secretary Treasurer of Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE), will gather for a rally outside Province House. The primary objective of this demonstration is to urge the government to resume negotiations with the striking workers. The event will feature speeches from notable figures like Candace Rennick and Melissa Marsman, President of Nova Scotia Federation of Labor. This public action aims to support the long term care workers currently on strike.

data.title: AtaiBeckley and PsyPAN Receive a Silver Award in 2026 Patient Participant Index, Reflecting Ongoing Commitment to Participant-Informed Research
data.description: AtaiBeckley Inc. (ATAI) was recently awarded the Silver Award in OVID Health's 2026 Patient Participant Index for their work with Psychedelic Participant Advocacy Network (PsyPAN) in enhancing participant engagement in psychedelic clinical research. The collaboration between AtaiBeckley and PsyPAN aims to improve patient outcomes by creating fast-acting, long-lasting, and convenient mental health treatments. This recognition acknowledges AtaiBeckley's ongoing partnership with PsyPAN to incorporate the perspectives of clinical trial participants into the creation of innovative mental health therapies, and share these insights with the industry.

data.title: Simplilearn Partners With The University of Oklahoma Outreach to Launch the Professional Certificate Program in Project Management With GenAI
data.description: In Plano, Texas on April 27, 2026, Simplilearn, a prominent player in digital upskilling, revealed the rollout of the Professional Certificate Program in Project Management alongside GenAI and in collaboration with The University of Oklahoma Outreach. Noteworthy for its exclusivity, this program offers...

data.title: TMT Finance Publishes Europe Market Sentiment Report 2026: M&A Optimism Surges as AI Dominates Digital Infrastructure Deal Activity
data.description: A recent survey conducted with 202 senior executives has shown an increasing confidence in mergers and acquisitions (M&A), despite valuation gaps continuing to widen. This data suggests a positive outlook on the M&A landscape. Additionally, it has been predicted that capital markets will play a significant role in reshaping the financing of European digital infrastructure by 2027. These insights were shared in London on April 27, 2026, by TMT Finance, a prominent provider of information and insights on M&A activities in the industry. This survey indicates a shift towards more optimistic sentiments among senior executives regarding M&A, with a focus on the European digital infrastructure sector in the coming years.

data.title: Sumsub Recognized as Leader in Chartis RiskTech Quadrant for Enterprise Fraud Solutions 2026
data.description: For the third year in a row, Sumsub, a worldwide leader in verification and anti-fraud services, has been named a Category Leader by Chartis RiskTech. The recognition extends across financial crime, identity, and compliance reports. This acknowledgment underscores Sumsub's industry-leading position and highlights its excellence in providing cutting-edge solutions in these important areas. The announcement was made in London on April 27, 2026, cementing Sumsub's reputation with a prestigious accolade.

data.title: Tryg - Transactions in connection with share buyback programme
data.description: Tryg A/S revealed on 22 January 2026 their plans to start a share buyback initiative of approximately DKK 1.0 billion. This program adheres to the EU Market Abuse Regulation, EU Regulation no. 596/2014 of 16 April 2014, and the regulations set forth in Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of 8 March 2016, known as the "Safe Harbour Regulation." The share buyback process is scheduled to conclude by 13 May 2026.
